name: La Estrella de Oro Pawn Shop
description_short: Licensed pawn shop in Miami specializing in firearms and collateral-based loans. Federal FFL Type 2 dealer offering pawn services for firearms and other valuables.
description_long:
La Estrella de Oro No. 32 is a federally licensed pawn shop located in Miami, Florida at 2208 NW 28 Street. The business operates under Federal Firearms License (FFL) Type 2, which permits pawnbroking in firearms other than destructive devices. The shop is part of the La Estrella de Oro pawn chain operating in the Miami area, with at least one additional location (No. 37) listed in the same region.

The business offers traditional pawn shop services, accepting collateral-based loans against firearms and other valuables. As an FFL Type 2 licensed dealer, they handle firearms transactions with full federal compliance and regulatory oversight. The shop is accessible by phone at (305) 381-5787 for inquiries and services.

La Estrella de Oro distinguishes itself through its federal firearms licensing and specialization in the firearms pawn market. The business is listed on Arms Directory, a niche platform dedicated to firearms dealers and 2A community businesses, indicating their specialized focus within the pawn industry. The company maintains active licensing compliance and registration with federal authorities.

Prospective customers should note that detailed information about loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, and specific items accepted is not available on the current listing. The business has no published customer reviews on the Arms Directory platform. As with all pawn transactions, borrowers should clarify all terms before pledging items, and understand that defaulted loans result in loss of collateral.
pros: Federally licensed FFL Type 2 dealer with active federal firearms license (1-59-***-**-**-31134)
Specialized in firearms pawn transactions with full regulatory compliance
Located in established Miami neighborhood with physical storefront at 2208 NW 28 St

Part of multi-location La Estrella de Oro chain indicating business stability
Listed on Arms Directory platform connecting to specialized firearms community
cons: No customer reviews published on current listing to verify service quality
Limited online information about loan terms, rates, or redemption periods
No website or social media presence beyond Arms Directory business listing
Unclear what collateral items beyond firearms are accepted
No transparency on APR, loan duration, or default consequences
best_for: Firearms owners needing quick collateral-based loans in the Miami area
Individuals seeking pawn services from federally licensed and compliant dealers
Those requiring firearms-specific pawn expertise with regulatory oversight
diagnosis: La Estrella de Oro No. 32 is best for firearms owners in Miami seeking federally compliant pawn services with immediate cash access. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing, terms, and customer reviews—borrowers should contact the shop directly to understand loan rates, redemption periods, and what items qualify beyond firearms before pledging collateral.
services: Federal FFL Type 2 firearms dealer services
meta_description: Licensed pawn shop in Miami specializing in firearms and collateral-based loans with Federal FFL Type 2 dealer status.
